plan.summary: Fix the compass-to-canvas angle conversion in the wind particle animation. The current formula `(windDir + 180) * π/180` incorrectly treats the meteorological compass bearing as a standard math angle, causing particles to blow in the wrong direction (e.g., East wind shows as particles from the South). The correct formula is `(windDir + 90) * π/180`, which properly converts from compass bearing (clockwise from North) to canvas angle (counterclockwise from East, Y-down).

steps.description: Fix the windRad formula in initParticles() inside sailing-weather.js: change `(windDir + 180) * Math.PI / 180` to `(windDir + 90) * Math.PI / 180`. Update the comment to explain the compass-to-canvas conversion. This is a single-line fix in the upload_text_asset call.
Visually verify the fix with screenshot_app — the particle animation should now blow westward for an East wind.
